title: Biden vs. Trump on college protests: What to make of clashing messages
shortDescription: Joe Biden and Donald Trump clashed this week on pro-Palestinian protests on college campuses, signaling competing messages for the 2024 election.

title: Would cameras in Donald Trump's hush money trial affect the election?
shortDescription: Most states allow cameras in court, but not New York, where Donald Trump is on trial. If they were, Trump and lawyers would grandstand, experts say.

title: Trump's $9,000 gag order fine paid. Additional contempt decision looms
shortDescription: With another gag order ruling looming, former President Donald Trump's $9,000 fines for repeated violations have been paid, per a court spokesperson.

title: Trump-endorsed Bible target of Biden's mockery in speech | Fact check
shortDescription: Biden mocked the "God Bless the USA" Bible endorsed by Donald Trump. He did not mock the book in general.

title: Michael Cohen's role in Trump's hush money trial
shortDescription: Donald Trump faces 34 counts of falsifying business records that included hush money payments during his 2016 presidential campaign.

title: Post misrepresents Trump's campaign remarks on 'iron dome' | Fact check
shortDescription: Trump pledged to build an air-defense system like Israel's Iron Dome if re-elected, but he didn't mention using it to defend against Canada.

title: Biden to meet with King of Jordan amid 'back and forth' with Israel on Rafah
shortDescription: Two recent meetings have seen 'back and forth' between U.S. and Israel officials on how to proceed in Rafah, which Netanyahu has vowed to invade.

title: Trump wants the presidential debates moved. it's unlikely to happen
shortDescription: The Trump campaign wants the Commission on Presidential Debates to move up the debates ahead of the 2024 presidential election.

title: Evidence shown to jury in Trump hush money trial
shortDescription: Prosecutors showed the jury evidence, released by the Manhattan Criminal Court, in Donald Trump's hush money trial, including remarks made by the former president at a 2016 campaign rally.

title: No, Trump didn't back forced monitoring of pregnant women | Fact check
shortDescription: Trump said abortion is a states' rights issue and that he would let states determine whether they wanted to monitor women's pregnancies.

title: A look at Joe Biden's history in politics
shortDescription: President Joe Biden has made his career out of being a politician, spending over half his life in various offices. Here's what you need to know.

title: Hope Hicks could testify about conversations with Cohen in Trump trial
shortDescription: Hope Hicks, a former campaign aide to Donald Trump, denies knowing about hush money payments but may be asked about calls with his lawyer.

title: Hakeem Jeffries: Abortion rights are 'about freedom' in 2024 elections
shortDescription: House Democratic leader Hakeem Jeffries said abortion rights will 'be an incredibly' significant issue in the upcoming elections.

title: Trump hush money trial recap: Hope Hicks tears up on witness stand
shortDescription: Former top Trump aide Hope Hicks became teary-eyed upon the beginning of her cross-examination by Donald Trump's attorney Emil Bove on Friday.

title: Ex-Wisconsin election worker fined for ordering military ballots with fake names
shortDescription: The charges against Kimberly Zapata came at a sensitive time for election workers after Donald Trump sought to sow doubt in election processes.
